description: Get a list of Workflow Presets

parameters.name: filters[is_default]
parameters.description: Filter by default preset. When true, returns only presets marked as default. When false, returns only non-default presets.

parameters.name: filters[is_valid]
parameters.description: Filter by configuration validity. When true, returns only presets with valid configuration (no configuration or external errors). When false, returns only presets with invalid configuration. When o...

valid.description: If true, this configured template is ready to use to generate an instance

default.description: If true, this configured template will be used by default for this tool
